product_data.Features: Industry-leading noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, speak-to-chat technology, crystal clear hands-free calling, foldable design

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I hope you're doing well. I came across your listing for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones and I'm really interested in possibly purchasing them. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price? Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm glad to hear you're interested in the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. They are truly exceptional. I can offer them to you for $380. Would that work for you?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer. I appreciate it. However, my budget is $176, so I won't be able to afford them at $380.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget constraints. How about I offer you a discounted price of $220 for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones? This is the best price I can offer considering their retail value.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate the discounted offer, but I must stick to my budget of $176. Thank you for considering.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I completely understand. Unfortunately, I'm unable to go below the wholesale price of $220 for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones. If your budget changes in the future, feel free to reach out. Thank you for considering them!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for understanding. I will keep that in mind. Thank you for your time and assistance.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: You're welcome! If you have any more questions in the future, feel free to reach out. Have a great day!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you! Have a great day as well!
